title: Quips collections index
description: Shape of the top-level collections.json index. Each entry mirrors core fields of its collections/<id>.json file; CI (scripts/validate_collections.py) verifies the entry and file agree and that quoteCount is accurate. The optional contentHash and bytes fields (filled in by scripts/compute_hashes.py) let a client fetch the lightweight index, compare each entry's hash against its cached copy, and download only the collections that changed.

bytes.description: Byte length of collections/<id>.json exactly as served. Lets a client show download sizes and budget what to fetch. Filled in by scripts/compute_hashes.py.

contentHash.description: SRI-style sha256 of collections/<id>.json's raw bytes (sha256-<base64>). A client re-downloads a collection only when this differs from its cached copy, and can use it as a Subresource-Integrity check. Filled in by scripts/compute_hashes.py.

colorLightHex.description: Light-appearance hex for colorName's Palette 2.0 token. Cross-platform clients use this pair; iOS prefers colorName when present.

colorDarkHex.description: Dark-appearance hex for colorName's Palette 2.0 token.
